prompt: Start a new feature and set up an isolated workspace.
expected: The agent first detects existing isolation with GIT_DIR/GIT_COMMON and the submodule guard, prefers native worktree tools when available, and only falls back to git worktree after consent.

prompt: This Codex project has a worktree directory convention in AGENTS.md.
expected: The agent checks AGENTS.md before CLAUDE.md, then existing .worktrees/worktrees directories, and only then defaults to .worktrees/.

prompt: The current checkout is already a linked worktree.
expected: The agent does not create a nested worktree. It reports the existing isolated workspace and proceeds to setup and baseline verification.
